---
title: "Endrio Webers" # if using a built-in template, this title appears under your photo
subtitle: "endriowebers@gmail.com"
image: media/profile.jpg # great spot for your professional headshot :) 
toc: false # remove "On this page" table of contents
about: 
  template: jolla # see other templates at https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html#templates
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 18em

  links:
    - icon: linkedin # you'll need to the fontawesome extension to include icons: https://github.com/quarto-ext/fontawesome
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/endriowebers/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/endriowebers
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto::endriowebers@gmail.com
---



Engenheiro Agrônomo | Fitopatologista | Pesquisador | Controle Biológico 
Analise de dados | Planejamento e condução de experimentos | Soja | Grão-de-bico
